## Pre-Merge Checklist
*(All items must be checked prior to review)*
- [ ] I have performed a critical self-review of my code before opening this PR.
- [ ] I have added/updated relevant tests, and all tests pass locally.
- [ ] I have updated documentation and added comments to complex areas.
